return(function(...)local i,C do local c,p,X,r,v=math.floor,string.char,string.byte,tonumber,string.sub local function D(i,C)local p=0 for X=0,7,1 do local r=i/2+C/2 if r~=c(r)then p=p+2^X end i=c(i/2)C=c(C/2)end return p end local G,h="iiihhhiiiiihssss","\240\142\167\226\193\226\182\205\014\153\217\231\200\025\247\221\004\167\003\145\000\000\001\000\000\001\a\000\000\000__index\006\000\000\000__call\005\000\000\000__mod\005\000\000\000__mul"local Q=65 local Y=1971 local E=true local function W(i)local W={}for C=1,#i,2 do local c=v(i,C,C+1)W[#W+1]=r(c,16)end local B={}for i=0,3,1 do local C=W[i+1]local c=((C-Y)+256)%256 local p=X(G,i%16+1)local r=X(h,i%Q+1)B[i+1]=D(D(c,p),r)end local m=((B[1]+B[2]*256)+B[3]*65536)+B[4]*16777216 local e={}for i=1,m,1 do local C=W[i+4]if E and i%2==0 then C=(C%16)*16+c(C/16)end local r=((C-Y)+256)%256 local v=(i-1)%16+1 local B=(i-1)%Q+1 local m=X(G,v)local b=X(h,B)e[i]=p(D(D(r,m),b))end return table.concat(e)end local m={}C=setmetatable({},{__index=function(i,C)return m[C]end,__call=function(i,C)return m[C]end,__mod=function(i,C)return m[C]end;__mul=function(i,C)return m[C]end,__metatable=false})function i(C)local c=m if not c[C]then for i=1,#B,1 do local p=B[i]local X=type(p[1])=="number"and p[1]or p[2]if X==C then local i=type(p[1])=="string"and p[1]or p[2]c[C]=W(i)break end end end return C end end return(function(c,X,r,v,D,G,h,f,Y,y,E,P,e,H,Q,p,B,m,z,W,j,b,g,d)P,E,d,f,y,m,B,Q,b,e,g,Y,j,W,H,p,z=function(i,C)local c=B(C)local X=function(X,r,v,D,G,h)return p(i,{X,r,v;D,G,h},C,c)end return X
